experience.description: Working as a Junior Software Developer Intern, developing and improving backend functionalities, building scalable APIs, and contributing to real-world software development projects on the company's learning platform.
responsibilities: Working on backend services and REST APIs for the company's learning platform
Writing new endpoints, fixing bugs, and adding features alongside the core team
Improving database queries and contributing to code reviews
Following standard Git workflows and CI checks before deploys
Enhancing application performance and optimizing backend systems
Collaborating with the development team to ensure smooth and efficient product functionality
achievements: Gained hands-on experience in backend development in an agile environment
Contributed to real-world product development cycles

experience.description: Built responsive web applications using React.js and Node.js across multiple client projects, implementing reusable UI components and MongoDB-backed REST APIs.
responsibilities: Built responsive web applications using React.js and Node.js across multiple client projects
Implemented reusable UI components and MongoDB-backed REST APIs
Used Git for version control and participated in code reviews
Contributed to a clean, maintainable component architecture
achievements: Delivered multiple client projects with reusable component architectures
Gained practical experience in full-stack MERN development

experience.role: Campus Ambassador – Gemini AI Awareness Program
experience.description: Running workshops and campaigns to introduce students to Gemini and generative AI tools for academic, creative, and problem-solving use cases.
responsibilities: Running workshops and campaigns on Gemini and generative AI
Introducing students to AI tools for academic and creative use cases
Promoting awareness of LLM capabilities and applications
achievements: Successfully conducted AI awareness sessions on campus
